title: London Borough of Croydon: Letter to the Chief Executive (17 July 2025)
body: "Copy of the letter from James Blythe, Deputy Director, Local Government Stewardship and Interventions at the Ministry of Housing, Communities and Local Government to London Borough of Croydon Chief Executive, Katherine Kerswell, confirming the decision by the Secretary of State to issue Directions on the Authority under section 15 of the Local Government Act 1999, extending the intervention until 20 July 2027 and appointing Commissioners. "
